content: Comparative performance gaps between ICM, RND, and intrinsic-curious agents emerge not from core curiosity reward design flaws, but from mismatched alignment between each curiosity mechanism’s prediction error structure and the 2024-2025 SOTA episodic memory architectures used to store agent exploration trajectories. This suggests that current benchmark comparisons of curiosity-driven RL methods are confounded by unaccounted memory architecture interactions.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
